nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for tedious tasks
nodes.grounding_span: This saves time - I don't have to go line by line through multiple pages to compare the contracts

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: It was also very accurate, which had been a concern of mine. The AI caught all the differences

nodes.label: AI as cooperative tool not replacement
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human thinking
nodes.grounding_span: I consider AI to be a very useful tool, but not a replacement for my own brain - it should be a cooperative venture

nodes.label: Preserving personal enjoyment and skills in writing
nodes.label_negative: Delegating enjoyable writing tasks to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write emails and process documents myself, rather than having AI write those

nodes.label: AI use as knowledge sharing to support team
nodes.label_negative: AI use limited to personal productivity only
nodes.grounding_span: I intentionally look for opportunities to use AI in my work. This allows me to share my knowledge with these team members

nodes.label: Workplace security restrictions on AI use
nodes.grounding_span: We are not permitted to use AI for meeting notes due to security reasons

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I want to maintain my skills in those areas

nodes.label: Team support and knowledge sharing
nodes.grounding_span: share my knowledge with these team members

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for contract comparison
nodes.grounding_span: The first time I used AI to compare contracts was definitely satisfying

nodes.label: Concern about AI impact on analytical skills
nodes.grounding_span: a heavy reliance on AI can negatively impact a person's ability to analyze and create

nodes.label: Intentional AI use to support team learning
nodes.grounding_span: I intentionally look for opportunities to use AI in my work

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for enjoyable writing tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write emails and process documents myself

nodes.label: Strategic task delegation based on enjoyment and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write emails and process documents myself, rather than having AI write those

nodes.label: Iterative verification and collaboration with AI for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If it is a complex task, I will go back and forth with the AI to make sure my requests are understood
